/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -pie --coverage -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/euxis-memory-cpp_tests.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/euxis-memory-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_store.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-memory-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_tier_isolation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-memory-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_destroy_keys.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-memory-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_entry.cpp.o" -o euxis-memory-cpp_tests  libeuxis-memory-cpp.a /usr/lib/libgtest_main.so.1.17.0 ../euxis-crypto-cpp/libeuxis-crypto-cpp.a /usr/lib/libsodium.so /usr/lib/libspdlog.so.1.17.0 /usr/lib/libfmt.so.12.1.0 /usr/lib/libgtest.so.1.17.0
